[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11001100 4
1 11111010 6
2 10011001 4
3 00101011 4
4 01101011 5
5 11111111 a
6 11111111 a
7 11111111 a
